parties.name: STEWART TITLE AND TRUST OF PHOENIX INC

legal_description.value: Lot 38, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19; Affidavit of Correction recorded in Document No. 2001-0849180

borrower_note.value: Maria Elena Delgado is the sole borrower. DOT is a standard SFR owner-occupied purchase-money loan with a garden-variety due-on-sale clause (12 USC § 1701j-3).

source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized purchase-money DOT on Delgado parcel 999-03-411 (LLC scenario). This DOT remains open and in Maria Elena Delgado's individual name even after the 2022 LLC conveyance — a live examiner concern explored in lc-012. Not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only purchase-money DOT for Delgado parcel 999-03-411 (LLC scenario); not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

mers_note: MERS beneficiary as nominee for Quicken Loans Inc. Note was subsequently sold to Rocket Mortgage LLC (successor-in-interest), but no assignment of DOT has been recorded in the parcel corpus.
